$comment: Valid equipment codes. 'code' MUST match the Equipment enum (Modules.ExerciseModule.Entities.Equipment). The current schema models 5 codes; finer real-world equipment (cable, kettlebell, cardio machine) maps onto the closest code and is preserved verbatim in the exercise 'equipmentDetail' field (and surfaced as a search tag) until the schema is upgraded. Used by ExerciseSeedDataValidator.

equipment.displayName: Dumbbell (and other hand-held free weights, e.g. Kettlebell)
